creator: bartsch@dssgmbh.de
text:
package creation of audacity-2.0.0_1 fails due to missing files.

pkg_info -g (after installation) reads:

Information for audacity-2.0.0_1:

Mismatched Checksums:
pkg_info: /usr/local/share/licenses/audacity-2.0.0/GPLv2 doesn't exist
pkg_info: /usr/local/share/licenses/audacity-2.0.0/LICENSE doesn't exist
pkg_info: /usr/local/share/licenses/audacity-2.0.0/catalog.mk doesn't exist

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/audio/audacity
portmaster -g .
